He will live upto the age of65-68 years.
CHART328
The native will be an intelligen"t
Mer.
Ven. man. He will take advantage of the
Mars Dh. services of his friends and give them
Sun up later. He will have interrupted edu
cation. Still he rises in life. He will
have quarrels with his brother. At 32-
Jupt Sat. 33 and 4 7, he will have gains as a
result of settlement of disputes with his
brother. His father (the Sun in exalta
Dt. tion) will have an expensive trading
concern dealing with silk, gold and
silver ware and diamonds etc.
Saturn is posited in the Sun's house Leo. Therefore, the native will take
up the father's concern and hold a decent place in public life and finally
become a prominent businessman.
CHART 329
Here Saturn is in Leo owned by the Sun, the king of planets. Then there
is Ketu in the house of intellect. The Moon is debilitated in Scorpio and
Jupiter is debilitated in Capricorn.
